project.name: vonavy_chronos
project.title: Best NN vs Chronos-2
project.snapshot_note: The incumbent results are preserved from the latest stable run; Chronos-2 remains intentionally absent until its weights are executed locally.

lineage.decision: Conditional demand, common rows, global WAPE
lineage.reason: Every contender is scored on the same purchasable product-days.
It avoids recursive feedback and matches the fixed one-week task.

lineage.decision: Guarded log-residual around a robust weekday anchor
lineage.reason: The anchor carries stable weekly level while the network learns departures.

lineage.decision: Three-seed PyTorch network with product and campaign embeddings
lineage.reason: This was the strongest defensible non-tree specification before Chronos-2 was introduced.

models.label: Best NN
models.blurb: The strongest specification developed in the original project: a direct seven-day neural residual forecaster with leakage-safe demand features and channel-aware structure.

models.label: Chronos-2
models.blurb: Amazon Chronos-2, evaluated zero-shot on the identical origins, product-date keys, information cutoff and scoring population as the frozen incumbent.
